phrases.translation_en: The car won't go – can you help?
The car needs to be repaired.
Do you know a good car service?
Yes, I can give you the phone number.

phrases.translation: Не могли бы вы отремонтировать машину?

phrases.translation_en: The car needs to be washed and cleaned.
Did you fill up with fuel?

phrases.translation: Я хотел бы взять машину напрокат.
phrases.translation_en: I would like to rent a car.
Are you renting out a room?
How much is it per month?
I would like to rent an apartment.

phrases.translation: Когда я мог бы осмотреть квартиру?
phrases.translation_en: When could I view the apartment?
Thank you very much for the invitation!
I invite you over for the weekend!

phrases.translation: Жаль, но в выходные не могу.
phrases.translation_en: Sorry, but I can't make it this weekend.
Thank you! We will definitely come!
On which floor do you live?
I would like you to open the window.
Can you turn off the TV?
It is cold here – the window needs to be closed.
It is dark – the light needs to be turned on.
What is the emergency service phone number?

phrases.translation: Лопнула труба! На кухне течёт вода!
phrases.translation_en: A pipe burst! Water is running in the kitchen!
The fridge / cooker / dishwasher broke down.

phrases.translation: Не могли бы вы убрать квартиру?

phrases.translation_en: When could you clean the house?

phrases.text: Reikia sutvarkyti virtuvę, vonią ir svetainę.
phrases.translation: Нужно убрать кухню, ванную и гостиную.
phrases.translation_en: The kitchen, bathroom and living room need cleaning.

phrases.text: Reikėtų išsiurbti kambarį ir išplauti grindis.
phrases.translation: Нужно пропылесосить комнату и вымыть полы.
phrases.translation_en: The room needs vacuuming and the floors need washing.
Thank you for cleaning the apartment!
I am looking for a woollen jumper.
I am looking for a children's jacket.

phrases.translation: На следующей неделе едем к морю.
phrases.translation_en: Next week we are going to the seaside.

phrases.text: Kiek laiko autobusas važiuoja į Kauną?
phrases.translation: Сколько времени едет автобус до Каунаса?
phrases.translation_en: How long does the bus journey to Kaunas take?

phrases.translation_en: Where can I leave my luggage?
phrases.chapter_title: Глава 20: Что вы любите делать в свободное время?
phrases.chapter_title_en: Chapter 20: What do you like to do in your free time?

phrases.text: Bagažo saugykloje. Ji yra už kasų.
phrases.translation: В камере хранения. Она находится за кассами.
phrases.translation_en: At the left luggage. It is behind the ticket offices.
phrases.chapter_title: Глава 20: Что вы любите делать в свободное время?
phrases.chapter_title_en: Chapter 20: What do you like to do in your free time?

phrases.translation_en: I invite you to my birthday!
Thank you, I will definitely come!
Happy New Year to you too!
